recent_announcements.company: Motilal Oswal Mutual Fund - Motilal Oswal Midcap 100 ETF
recent_announcements.summary: MOM100     : Motilal Oswal Asset Management Company Limited has informed the Exchange that the Net Asset Value (per unit) of Motilal Oswal Mutual Fund - Motilal Oswal MOSt Shares M100 ETF GO as on July 07, 2026 is Rs. 67.14. |SUBJECT: Declaration of NAV
